Package org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts

Class NHANESSample

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.concepts.NHANESSample
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class NHANESSample extends Object implements Serializable
Representation of a sample of information from NHANES - https://www.cdc.gov/nchs/nhanes/index.htm Synthea contains a file that is a sample of NHANES information from 1999 - 2015 where heights and weights were recorded for individuals between 24 and 36 months old.
See Also:

    • loadSamples

      public static List<NHANESSample> loadSamples()
      Load the NHANES samples from resources.
      Returns:
      A list of samples.

    • loadDistribution

      public static org.apache.commons.math3.distribution.EnumeratedDistribution<NHANESSample> loadDistribution()
      Load the NHANES samples from resources into an EnumeratedDistribution. The samples, probabilities, which were calculated from the sample weights are used to create the distribution. This means that when sampling values from the distribution, the possibility of getting a particular value will be properly weighted.
      Returns:
      the weighted distribution of NHANES Samples
